name: ryandesigns-site
description: Modern static portfolio for Ryan Designs, showcasing practical AI tools, active coding upskilling, automation projects, SQL portfolio work, creator analytics, GitHub work, support links, and protected email contact options.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const checks=[\"Husband. Father. Builder.\", \"Build what matters.\", \"actively sharpening my technical foundation\", \"Python, SQL\", \"ChatGPT and Claude\", \"ko-fi.com/gelassoldat\", \"buymeacoffee.com/ryancreates\", \"emailBtn\", \"emailModal\", \"copyEmailBtn\", \"openMailBtn\", \"favicon.svg\", \"HyperLiquid AI Perp Trader\", \"Remote Role Agent\", \"TokSignal Creator Analyzer\", \"Community Health Intelligence\", \"community-health-intelligence\", \"projectSearch\"]; for (const item of checks) { if (!html.includes(item)) { throw new Error('Missing expected content: '+item); } } const hiddenEmail='hello'+'@'+'ryandesigns'+'.'+'dev'; const absent=[\"kofiwidget2\", \"Widget_2.js\", hiddenEmail]; for (const item of absent) { if (html.includes(item)) { throw new Error('Unexpected content found: '+item); } } if (!fs.existsSync('favicon.svg')) { throw new Error('Missing favicon.svg'); } const forbidden='Berk'+'eley'; if (html.includes(forbidden)) { throw new Error('Unexpected last name found in page content'); } console.log('Static portfolio tests passed');"
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('index.html',path.join('dist','index.html')); fs.copyFileSync('favicon.svg',path.join('dist','favicon.svg')); if (fs.existsSync('_redirects')) fs.copyFileSync('_redirects',path.join('dist','_redirects')); if (!fs.existsSync(path.join('dist','index.html'))) throw new Error('dist/index.html missing'); if (!fs.existsSync(path.join('dist','favicon.svg'))) throw new Error('dist/favicon.svg missing'); console.log('Static site built successfully into dist');"

author: Ryan
